label: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity

node.label: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity
node.definition: Local update rules change connections from pre/post activity, errors, correlation, or spike timing without general end-to-end backpropagation.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity is modeled as depending on Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences and feeding downstream nodes such as Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers, Self-organizing maps & competitive learning.

atlas downstream link to Self-organizing maps & competitive learning
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.
